[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011010111 7
1 1111110010 7
2 0100110110 5
3 0010010001 3
4 1001110100 5
5 1100101001 5
6 0111110000 5
7 1001100000 3

01 10 1000100000 2
12 21 1100000000 2
23 32 0100000000 1
34 43 0001000001 2
45 54 1011010010 5
56 65 0100110010 4
67 76 0000010000 1
70 07 0000010000 1

02 20 1000000100 2
13 31 0100001001 3
24 42 1010000100 3
35 53 0101000000 2
46 64 0000010110 3
57 75 0010010000 2
60 06 0000110100 3
71 17 0000000001 1

03 30 0001000000 1
14 41 1000000001 2
25 52 1110000000 3
36 63 0100000000 1
47 74 0010010001 3 match 3
50 05 1001110000 4
61 16 0100100000 2
72 27 0010000000 1

04 40 1001010100 4
15 51 1100100000 3
26 62 0100000100 2
37 73 0000000001 1
[completion]
